title: Cue Admin Review Ticket v0
description: Admin review-ticket payload emitted when an agent run touches a governance-flagged surface (deployment tests, SaaS API usage, costly resources, PII access, high-risk capabilities). Field set matches cclab_agent::types::ReviewTicket and #1545 acceptance criterion #3.

resource.description: Resource the agent acted on (e.g. SaaS endpoint, cloud bucket, PII column).

risk.description: Risk category — free-form string; consumers may map to internal taxonomies.

output.description: Concrete output the agent produced for this resource (e.g. SQL run, file deleted, API called).

rationale.description: Agent's stated reason for the action — what humans review.
